subcodes.first_line: Thy mention hath been made in the presence of this Wronged One, and these exalted words have been revealed purely for the sake of God, and in each letter [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکرت نزد مظلوم مذکور و این کلمات عالیات خالصا لوجه الله نازل و در هر حرفی از
